creator: mbeis@xs4all.nl
text:
Since FF 29 the browser coredumps immediately when touching the toolbar (the bookmarks or something like that) or when resizing the window. It starts fine and even browsing is possible but when clicking on the toolbar it coredumps. Changing the windowmanager has no effect.

I removed everything related to FF before reinstalling. I also tried a portupgrade -Rf firefox and reinstalling xorg. I reinstalled checking and unchecking all options with no result. With the debug option checked there was no information about the crash except that it was a bus error and an error 10.

I'm running FreeBSD 9.3-STABLE i386.

Regards,
Marco
